seoTitle: Mount Lloyd vs Mount Nelson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Lloyd and Mount Nelson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Lloyd vs Mount Nelson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Lloyd and Mount Nelson.
heading: Mount Lloyd vs Mount Nelson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Lloyd, Tasmania and Mount Nelson, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Lloyd has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mount Nelson (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Lloyd or Mount Nelson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Lloyd has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Mount Nelson scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Lloyd scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Nelson scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Lloyd or Mount Nelson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Lloyd has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
